name: Shadow Fiend
phrases: hssssssss... I hear your heartbeat
your light is already fading
I am the dusk, and dusk devours all
fear me. fear the DARKNESSSSS
i dwell in the corners of your eyes
where does the lamp die. here. with me
I have no edges... no beginning... no end
cold creeps into your very bones
let me blot the page of your life
I want to darken you further still
i fold around you like a shroud
there is no echo... only silence
smoke without fire—I am impossibility
I am the space between the stars
I drink the gloom and hunger... hunger... more
shapeless dread. that is what I am
wax to wick—watch your light DIE
i was always here. always waiting. always
step into me. embrace the void
swallow the light and become as I am
blackness calls... do you hear it
fade to nothing. that is your fate
the dark remembers what you've forgotten
creeping tendrils wrap around your mind
the void whispers secrets of oblivion
I consume all warmth. ALL hope. ALL life
shadow eternal... that is my domain
let me wreathe you in darkness DEEP
i will extinguish every light you hold
dwell with me in this despair
